#dubaiwatches #bvlgari #vintage #swisswatch

⚡️ Breitling Chronograph Automatic
📍 Ref. A13035.1
📅 Original certificate date: 18 August 1999
🏷️ 7,500dhs +VAT

Bold without apology, built with purpose, and backed by original papers from 1999.

Featuring a stunning metallic blue dial, contrasting silver subdials, rider-tab bezel, and Breitling’s unmistakable aviation-inspired design language, this A13035.1 is everything collectors love about the brand’s golden era.

41mm recently polished case with the original polished bracelet upto 19cm wrists. 

Tabby, Tamara, card and cash payment options.
www.mainspringdubai.com 

https://mainspringdubai.com/products/breitling-colt-automatic-chronograph-prelived-swiss-watch

#breitling #watch #chronograph #swisswatch

“What’s the best therapy for me?”

Easy answer…spending weekends at the flea market surrounded by my vintage timepieces, uncovering the history behind each watch and sharing those stories with fellow collectors. 

Every piece has its own character, memories, and journey through time — and that passion became Mainspring.dxb. I’d love for you to stop by and visit me at the flea market every weekend.

@dubaifleamarket
#vintagewatches #watchcollector #horology #fleafind #dubaiwatches
